'''''SHADIS Magazine'' 42''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[1996]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including campaign settings for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[["Well, When I Blew Up the Death Star...": 3 Alternative Campaigns]]" and was written by [[Steven Marsh]].
